items.prompt: In a cocotb test, dut is…
choices: The hierarchy root handle from the simulator
items.explain: dut is the top handle; attribute dots walk the design tree.

items.prompt: A missing hierarchy name like dut.uart.ghost usually raises AttributeError.
items.explain: Bad paths fail loudly; there is no silent None for a mistyped signal.

choices: Are ignored; only the last name matters
Walk nested instances until the leaf signal
items.explain: Each dot step descends the hierarchy the same way.
